channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Understanding the Purpose and History of the Met Gala
item.description: The Met Gala, widely recognized for its extravagant fashion displays and red carpet glamour, actually began with a clear philanthropic purpose. Established in 1948, the gala was created to raise funds...

item.title: Charlene Ruto Showcases Dance Moves at Youth Event
item.description: Charlene Chelagat Ruto, daughter of President William Ruto, has once again captured public attention after a video of her dancing at a youth event went viral. In the clip, Charlene is seen confidently...

item.title: Arsenal to Play Champions League Final with Early Kick-off in Budapest
item.description: Arsenal have made it to their first Champions League final in 20 years after beating Atletico Madrid 2-1 on aggregate. The final will take place on Saturday, May 30, at the Puskas Arena in Budapest, H...

item.title: Quadruplets Born to Mom Initially Expecting Twins at Steve Biko Hospital
item.description: Nomcebo Likhuleni, a 30-year-old mother from Buyelani, Mpumalanga, was expecting twins but was astonished to discover she was carrying quadruplets. With a family history of twins, she initially assume...

item.title: Lacson Says Flood Control Scam Involves Multiple Parties, No Single Mastermind
item.description: Senator Panfilo Lacson clarified on May 6, 2026, that there is no single 'overall mastermind' behind the alleged flood control scam. During recent discussions, Lacson emphasized that the scheme appear...

item.title: Trump issues ultimatum to Iran amid ongoing war negotiations
item.description: US President Donald Trump has issued a new ultimatum to Iran, demanding it accept a peace deal to end the ongoing war, or face a renewed wave of US bombing described as 'at a much higher level and int...

item.title: Australian authorities prepare for the return of IS-linked families amid escalating international tensions
item.description: Australian authorities are preparing to receive four women and nine children linked to the Islamic State as they arrive in Sydney and Melbourne tonight, with police ready to make arrests. Meanwhile, t...

item.title: Fatal Two-Vehicle Collision East of Calgary Leaves One Dead and One Injured
item.description: A tragic two-vehicle collision occurred on the morning of Wednesday, May 6, 2026, at the intersection of Highway 1 (Trans-Canada Highway) and Range Road 281, just east of Chestermere, Alberta. The Alb...

item.title: Trump Temporarily Halts Project Freedom Amid Iran Strait Tensions
item.description: Tensions between the U.S. and Iran escalated in the Strait of Hormuz as President Donald Trump's initiative, known as 'Project Freedom,' aimed to ensure the free movement of ships through this strateg...

item.title: Vincent and Stella Strengthen Their Bond in The Alibi Episode 36
item.description: In the latest episode of 'The Alibi,' viewers witnessed a pivotal moment in the relationship between Vincent and Stella. Despite facing misunderstandings and challenges, both characters demonstrated r...

item.title: Health Minister Clarifies South African Rats Do Not Carry Hantavirus
item.description: Health Minister Dr Aaron Motsoaledi has reassured the public that rats in South Africa, including those in Alexandra township, do not carry the hantavirus responsible for recent deaths on a cruise shi...

item.title: Federal Government Awards Carter Bridge Reconstruction to CCECC
item.description: The Federal Government don officially hand over di construction of di new Carter Bridge for Lagos to China Civil Engineering Construction Corporation (CCECC). Di project dey worth ₦545 billion, wey de...

item.title: APC NWC Waives Screening For President Tinubu Ahead of 2027 Elections
item.description: The All Progressives Congress (APC) don officially waive all screening requirements for President Bola Tinubu as e dey prepare for the 2027 elections. According to APC spokesman Felix Morka, the party...

item.title: Trump Claims Iran Has Agreed to Forgo Nuclear Weapons Amid Ongoing Talks
item.description: President Donald Trump announced that the United States has held what he described as productive discussions with Iranian representatives, asserting that Iran has agreed to refrain from developing nuc...

item.title: Canada’s Electric Vehicle Strategy Faces Major Setbacks as Honda Suspends Ontario Plant
item.description: Canada’s ambitious plan to become a hub for North American electric vehicle (EV) production is encountering serious challenges. Honda has indefinitely suspended its $15-billion EV plant project in All...

item.title: Government Measures on Fuel Expected to Ease Inflation Next Month, Lawmaker Says
item.description: A lawmaker has expressed optimism that inflation rates in the Philippines could decrease in the upcoming month, citing the government's recent interventions to address the ongoing fuel crisis. Accordi...

item.title: Former Kenya Lionesses Coach Felix Oloo Dies in Washington at 41
item.description: Felix Oloo, famously known as 'Ade' or 'Mwalimu', the former head coach of the Kenya Lionesses, has tragically passed away at the age of 41 in Washington, USA. Oloo, who also played for Nakuru RFC for...

item.title: Xavier School Alumni Hold Golf Tournament at Wack Wack Golf and Country Club
item.description: Xavier School alumni recently organised a golf tournament held at the well-known Wack Wack Golf and Country Club, bringing together former students for a day of sport, camaraderie, and networking. Whi...

item.title: Federal budget set to boost R&D incentives while removing CGT discount worries start-ups
item.description: The upcoming federal budget is expected to introduce significant changes aimed at boosting research and development (R&D) in Australia. Treasurer Jim Chalmers plans to increase the current $150 millio...

item.title: Former OpenAI Executives Describe Internal Conflicts During Sam Altman's Leadership
item.description: During Elon Musk’s ongoing lawsuit against OpenAI, former technology chief Mira Murati testified that CEO Sam Altman caused significant internal conflict and distrust among the company's top executive...
